programs.title: Le cinéma de Terry Gilliam : l'imagination au pouvoir
programs.desc: A look at the artistic achievements of Terry Gilliam, screenwriter, director, actor and animator.From the comedy "Brazil" to the painting "The Man Who Killed Don Quixote", through the works of the Monty Python cabaret.

programs.title: The Goldsmith's Secret
programs.desc: 1999. Goldsmith Juan Pablo travels from Spain to New York for an exhibition of his works.On the way he passes through his hometown.He will meet Celia, a great love who changed his life.

programs.title: Barry
programs.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root.

programs.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programs.desc: Sarah (Margot Robbie) and David (Colin Farrell) meet at a friend's wedding.They go on an expedition during which they relive the most important moments from their past.

actor: Father of the Bride - Mike Meldman

programs.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programs.desc: The Hobbit Frodo Baggins comes into possession of a magical Ring.His relative Bilbo obtained it during his expedition to the Lonely Mountain.This extraordinary gem can give its owner control over the world, which is why its creator - the Lord of Darkness Sauron - will do anything to get it back.The wizard Gandalf knows that the Ring must be destroyed.There is only one way to do this - by throwing him into the fire that burns inside Mount Doom.However, getting there is very difficult.A council is called in Rivendell on this matter.Frodo undertakes a dangerous mission to destroy the jewel.He is accompanied by his friendly hobbits, Sam Gamgee and Pippin and Merry, as well as representatives of other races: the elf Legolas, the dwarf Gimli, people - Aragorn and Boromir - and Gandalf.The ring has a sinister power that is difficult to avoid.It arouses strong desire and influences the psyche, which puts the team to the test.Meanwhile, Sauron sends his troops against her.
